entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a legume species used in hybridization attempts

entities.name: ATYLOSIA
entities.description: Atylosia species used for crossing with Cajanus cajan

entities.name: INTERGENERIC INCOMPATIBILITY
entities.description: The biological incompatibility between different genera that prevents successful hybridization

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species within the same genus

entities.name: HYBRID EMBRYOS
entities.description: Embryos resulting from interspecific or intergeneric crosses

entities.name: EMBRYO CULTURE
entities.description: The technique of culturing hybrid embryos to obtain viable seeds

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in interspecific crosses

entities.name: HORMONE TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of hormones during pollination to facilitate hybrid embryo production

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The transfer of pollen to the stigma to initiate fertilization

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, used in crosses with wild species and as rootstocks for grafting

entities.name: TETRAPLOID WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species with four sets of chromosomes used in hybridization with groundnut

entities.name: OVULE AND EMBRYO CULTURE
entities.description: The culture of ovules and embryos to produce hybrid callus and shoots

entities.name: HYBRID CALLUS
entities.description: An undifferentiated mass of cells produced from hybrid culture

entities.name: SHOOTS
entities.description: Above-ground plant parts produced from hybrid culture

entities.name: ROOTS
entities.description: Below-ground plant parts that the researchers attempted to induce

entities.name: GRAFTING
entities.description: The process of attaching hybrid shoots onto groundnut seedlings

entities.name: DIPLOID WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species with two sets of chromosomes used as sources of resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand pests or diseases

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of agricultural output

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The specific ability of a plant to resist diseases

entities.name: PLOIDY AND GENOME MANIPULATION
entities.description: Techniques used to alter the number of chromosome sets or genome structure to produce improved lines
